texto: What?""Nothing." He laughed."You were really hungry.""I don't need to defend my eating to anyone.And just so you know,when I'm done with this,I plan to eat three whole cookies.""Whoa." He held up his hands."Now you're pulling out the big guns.""I don't mess around.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Tristi Pinkston que provoca limites e escolhas conscientes. Ao questionar “What?""Nothing." He laughed."You were really hungry.""I don't need to defend my eating to anyone.…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre humor, addie, blake, com foco em termino e blake.

frase_original: What?""Nothing." He laughed."You were really hungry.""I don't need to defend my eating to anyone.And just so you know,when I'm done with this,I plan to eat three whole cookies.""Whoa." He held up his hands."Now you're pulling out the big guns.""I don't mess around.
